sys_hub_flow.name: ReturnFlow Decision

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_efb7973653400310def451a0a0490edf

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_efb7973653400310def451a0a0490edf

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: update return record to finance approved
Close the return request
update return record to rejected
Inform requester on warehouse decision
Looks up the warehouse task to grab reason for rejection
create a task for finance to approve refund
updates the order return record with the price and item category of order item
lookup the order item record
Creates a task for warehouse team
Send drop-off email to requester
Update record to return approved
Send an email to requester notifying them of approved return
wait for finance to approve refund
update record to closed approved
Wait for warehouse team to approve or reject return

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time
Wait for a duration of time

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: ReturnFlow Decision

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_46f070d753c88310def451a0a0490ea7

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: wait for finance to approve refund
Update record to return approved
update return record to rejected
create a task for finance to approve refund
update return record to finance approved
lookup the order item record
Close the return request
updates the order return record with the price and item category of order item
Send an email to requester notifying them of approved return
Wait for warehouse team to approve or reject return
Send drop-off email to requester
update record to closed approved
Looks up the warehouse task to grab reason for rejection
Creates a task for warehouse team
Inform requester on warehouse decision

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time
Wait for a duration of time
